description_long: This house is situated on a rectangular plot of green land bordered by a road on one side and a body of water on the other. The main building is a simple, boxy structure with a flat roof and a white exterior, accompanied by a smaller outbuilding connected by a paved driveway. The house features a prominent front entryway with a small porch and steps, and several windows are visible on the front and sides, arranged in a regular pattern. The property is accessed via a driveway that leads from the main road, curving toward the house and outbuilding. The surrounding landscape is flat and open, with no visible fencing or significant landscaping features. The overall design is modern and minimalistic, emphasizing clean lines and functional layout.
description: A modern, flat-roofed white house with a small outbuilding, set on a green plot between a road and a body of water, featuring a paved driveway and a simple, clean design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main house, entryway, driveway, and outbuilding, with the road in the foreground and water in the background.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway leading from the road to the house and outbuilding, with the water visible on the right.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the house facing the water, with the driveway and outbuilding in the background.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the house, driveway, and outbuilding, with the road on the left and water on the right.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple front entry with a small porch, steps, and a single main door, minimal decorative elements
